arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt welcome Elye Wahi, Dina Ebimbe appears poised for exit
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt officially confirmed the signing of French striker Elye Wahi on Friday. In other SGE-related transfer news, RMC sport reports that there may be a French departure from the RheinMain club.

arts.ttl: Bamo Meïté, Chancel Mbemba and Ismaël Koné being discussed in the transfer of Amine Gouiri to Marseille
arts.sum: According to La Provence, Rennes and Marseille are discussing potential players who could join the Breton club as part of a deal that would see Amine Gouiri (24) move to OM.…

arts.ttl: Rennes predicted XI vs Monaco: Amine Gouiri to start despite Marseille interest
arts.sum: On a four-match losing run in all competitions, Rennes will be hoping to turn their fortunes around as they travel to the Stade Louis II to face podium-sitters Monaco in…
